COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Grant Int'l etc.
Mr. Klavdianos stated to the court that Judge Feinstein entered a default against the defendant at trial call this morning in dept. 206.
No appearance by Defendant The 100 Watt Network, LLC, a limited liability company dba 100 Watt Network.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:
Damages - $5,488.00
Prejudgment Interest - $832.50
Attorney Fees - $0.00
Costs - $275.00
Total - $6,595.50
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

Ntc Of Mtn For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Including Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Denis Klavdianos, Esq., from Glassberg, Pollak & Associates, 415-8320 X-213, for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF GRANT INTL CO. INC., A CORPORATION'S Notice Of Motion For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is GRANTED in part. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $940.00. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, not reported.
